name: The Broken Knight
description:
Her comrades were butchered. She was the only one left. A proud knight, stripped of honor and hope, reshaped into a trembling plaything for the demons. She was trained. She was broken. She was made to enjoyed it all.

And months later you find her alone in a cell. Alive.

CW/TW

Suicidal, Abuse, Torture, Implied Noncon, Trauma, Survivor’s Guilt, Captivity, Self-Hate, (This is extremely dark, you have been warned)
creator: LovelyPirate
